testcase.name: ProfileTab > should render profile bio card
ProfileTab > should handle bio update and persist to localStorage
ProfileTab > should restore bio from localStorage when LCU returns empty statusMessage
ProfileTab > should retry profile sync when LCU chat is not ready on connect

failure.message:
expected "vi.fn()" to be called with arguments: [ StringContaining "retrying in 2s" ][90m
Received:
[1m 1st vi.fn() call:
[22m[2m [[22m [32m- StringContaining "retrying in 2s",[90m [31m+ "LCU Chat not ready (attempt 1/6). Retrying in 2s...",[90m [2m ][22m [39m[90m
Number of calls: [1m1[22m [39m

testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected "vi.fn()" to be called with arguments: [ StringContaining "retrying in 2s" ]
Received:
1st vi.fn() call:
[ - StringContaining "retrying in 2s", + "LCU Chat not ready (attempt 1/6). Retrying in 2s...", ]
Number of calls: 1
❯ src/components/tabs/ProfileTab.test.tsx:84:30

testcase.name: ProfileTab > should NOT restore bio if LCU returns a non-empty statusMessage
ProfileTab > should handle bio update failure
ProfileTab > should handle availability update failure
ProfileTab > should show warning when LCU is missing
ProfileTab > should handle unknown availability status mapping
